feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Secure Service Layer external access with signed SSL cert
entry.content:
Hi All,

the current SAPB1 server setup uses self-signed SSL cert (SLD and ServiceLayer) and the server name is just SAP

the requirement here is to make ServiceLayer available for external access to integrate with SalesForce and secure it with a signed SSL cert as SalesForce doesn't accept self-signed certs.

I understand that a valid signed SSL cert has to be bought and installed to SLD/SL, but for SAP hostname?

the remote ServiceLayer link would be https://sap.companyname.com:50000

what would be the best approach here?

Regards

GN

entry.title: System Fields Clearing after Document Add/Update
entry.content: I am experiencing an issue with fields in SAP B1 randomly clearing upon adding/updating new marketing documents.  I've seen it with the "Remarks Field", "Customer Ref. No." field, and different addresses under the "Ship-To" field on the logistics tab. Has anyone run into this before? I keep looking back at documents and realizing information is missing. Unfortunately it is quite random and I can't repeatedly replicate it.

entry.title: Customize Button is not visible Add on development SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am trying to develop a customized button into Sales Order screen But during project build type , it is showing error as per attachment.

Suggest the correct steps to make simple new button via visual studio into SAP Sales order screen.

Kind regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: SPAD
entry.content:
Hi All

Does SAP Business One has SPAD?

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: DTW PROBLEM WITH INCOMING PAYMENT PARTIALLY PAID
entry.content:
Hello Experts! I need your help

I'm trying to import incoming payments that are partially paid with DTW. This is an example of my template:

ORCT:

RCT2:

The total amount of the invoice is S/ 17,700.00 (S/ is Peruvian currency). 

After importing with DTW without error messages. The invoice is closed and the payment document created is the next one

I can see the Payment on Account box checked, which isn't correct. The total payment in details is also wrong. I have tried the same template on other businesses' SAP and it works wonders. 

One difference with other businesses' SAP is the local currency, the others are S/, and the one with problems is US$. Also, when I work the same template with an invoice of US$ currency, there are no problems. Only when the invoice currency is S/, this one is closed.

entry.title: SAP B1 Suggestion for implementing San Francisco Soda Tax?
entry.content:
I have a client request to implement the San Francisco Soda tax that is a flat charge rather than a percentage. It has been in effect for about 5 years so I'm hoping someone else has implemented this already.
https://sftreasurer.org/business/taxes-fees/sugary-drinks-tax#collapse-accordion-2124-2

SAP Business One

entry.title: SAP B1 Fixed Asset Invoice return & "Sales Item" checkbox remove
entry.content:
Hi everybody!

I have an 2 issues I would like your help with. First I have an invoice that was entered by mistake with Fixed asset row. According to SAP Note 3321442 you cannot create a credit memo or return for this type of invoices. The solution proposed is to cancel the invoice. But it in my country it is illegal to cancel  or void an issued invoice, only  returns are allowed. 

The second issues I have around 2000 fixed assets. for some reason (previously done) they were uploaded by the "Sales Item" check box checked. so they appear in the list of items you are allowed to sell. I want to mass upload this particular check box to '0' to be unchecked. I was able to do this in the item master data but I cannot do it in the fixed assets as it keeps asking for full details of the assets (capitalization date, historical cost, etc...). any advise will be much  appreciated

entry.title: SAP B1 Search not bringing up AR Reserve Invoice results
entry.content:
Hello

I'm trying to search for an AR Reserve Invoice in the master search but I've discovered they only show in the results if you are a superuser. I've tested by giving a user full authorisations and they still don't show, only when they are checked as superuser.

Anyone else familiar with this? All other documents seem to show.

User with superuserUser with full authorsations

Kind regards.

entry.title: Purchase request function not showing in SAP Business One client
entry.content:
Hi ALl,

 

I am experiencing an issue where I cannot see the Purchase Request function in the SAP Business One web client (B1 Version: 10.0.190.FPO2202). I noticed this while testing some approval processes. Additionally, I believe this issue is related to the fact that the approval pending notification is popping up, but nothing is opening. When I tried the same process with a Purchase Order, it worked fine. I have checked the setup to see if there are any specific settings or authorizations required separately for the web client, but I couldn't find anything.

 

Looking forward to your expertise on this at the earliest.

entry.title: How to get memory utilization schema wise
entry.content:
Hi

We are using HANA 2.0 for SAP Business One and its hosted on cloud, using Azure, we want to check the hana memory utilization for each schema wise, so that we  can appropriately size the hana engine

SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA SAP HANA

entry.title: Create LinkedButton in form suppliers invoice
entry.content:
Good morning dear, my code is the following:

if (pVal.EventType == BoEventTypes.et_FORM_LOAD && pVal.BeforeAction ==false)
{

Form oForm = Application.SBO_Application.Forms.GetForm("141", 0);

Item i = oForm.Items.Add("btnlink" + valor.ToString(), BoFormItemTypes.it_LINKED_BUTTON);
i.LinkTo ="U_FIELD"; 
i.Height = 9; // To fit a linkbutton it should be 9 pixel high

i.Left = oItemName2.Left - 19;
i.Top = oItemName2.Top + 4;

// i.Top = oItemName2.Top - 1;//oForm.Height - (oItemName2.Height + 48);
// i.Left = oItemName2.Left + oItemName2.Width + 1; //+ 5
// i.Width = oItemName2.Width - 80;
// i.Height = oItemName2.Height + 1;
LinkedButton lb = (LinkedButton)i.Specific;
lb.LinkedObjectType = "30";
lb.LinkedObject = BoLinkedObject.lf_JournalPosting;

}

When I open more than 1 supplier invoice forms at the same time, the button only works on the first open form and the error Item Already exists appears on the others, please support.

Kind regards.

entry.title: Error creating Return or CreditMemo (Draft or not) with Additional Expenses
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm trying to create a return or credit memo as a draft (or not) with additional expenses from return request but I receive the error below:

 

{
    "error": {
        "code": "-1004",
        "details": [
            {
                "code": "",
                "message": ""
            }
        ],
        "message": "'234000031' is not a valid value for property 'BaseDocType'. The valid values are: '23' - 'Sales Quotation',  '17' - 'Sales Order',  '15' - 'Delivery notes',  '16' - 'Return',  '13' - 'A/R Invoice',  '203' - 'Down Payment Incoming',  '204' - 'Down Payment Outgoing',  '22' - 'Purchase order',  '20' - 'Good Receipt PO',  '21' - 'Goods Return',  '18' - 'A/P Invoice',  '540000006' - 'Purchase Quotation',  '1470000113' - 'Purchase Request',  '0' - '',  '-1' - ''"
    }
}

 

The JSON is very simple:

 

{
    "DocObjectCode": "16",
    "DocumentLines": [{
            "BaseType": 234000031,
            "BaseEntry": 1,
            "BaseLine": 0,
            "InventoryQuantity": 1.0
        }
    ],
    "DocumentAdditionalExpenses": [{
            "BaseDocEntry": 1,
            "BaseDocLine": 0,
            "BaseDocType": 234000031
        }
    ]
}

 

If I just change DocObjectCode for 15 and BaseType and BaseDocType for 17, the delivery is created.

If I remove DocumentAdditionalExpenses, the return is created.

According with the help, the thing I want to do is possible:

I've tried on patchs 2305, 2308 and 2402 HX1

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Equipment Card is not showing all the operations
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

When creating an equipment card, I noticed not all operations are being shown. 

In the outgoing goods, there should be two operations and its only showing one of them. 

There are no filters. Does anyone know why this is happening?

Thank you!!

entry.title: Incomplete batch request body
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are working on Fiori Elements with SAP Business One.

Using  BAS (Business Application Studio) and Fiori: "Open application generator", We have

 created a Fiori Elements app (List Report Object Page).

 Following are the project and version details:

When we run the project and click on "Go" button for fetching the data we receive error "Incomplete batch request body" as shown in below screen shot.

We have already added "groupId"= "$direct" in manifest.json file as explained on community

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/fiori-elements-sap-business-one-service-layer-and-quot-incomplete-batch/qaq-p/12557716

but still we are unable to resolve the same. Please guide us with the correct process to execute the fiori project.

Thank you in Advance.

 

Best Regards ,

Pritam Gaikwad.

entry.title: SMTP Server requires a secured Connection or the client was not Authenticated
entry.content:
Hi All

Mass Email is suddenly not sending with SMTP Authentication error.

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Prevent an inventory transfer from expired batch in sap business One Transaction notification
entry.content:
I want to Prevent an Inventory Transfer from expired batch in sap business One Transaction notification. What am I doing wrong?

IF LTRIM(RTRIM(@object_type)) = '67' AND (@transaction_type in( 'A','U'))

BEGIN

declare @item as nvarchar(20)

declare @batch as nvarchar(32)

declare @whs as nvarchar(8)

declare @expDate as datetime

SELECT @item=OBTN.ItemCode, @batch=OBTN.DistNumber, @whs=OBTW.WhsCode, @expDate=OBTN.ExpDate

FROM WTR1 INNER JOIN OBTW ON OBTW.WhsCode = WTR1.WhsCode and WTR1.ItemCode = OBTW.ItemCode and

WTR1.DocEntry = CAST(@list_of_cols_val_tab_del AS INT)

INNER JOIN OBTN ON OBTW.ItemCode = OBTN.ItemCode

 

WHERE OBTN.Status = '0' AND WTR1.LineStatus='O'

IF (LTRIM(RTRIM(@item)) <> '' AND LTRIM(RTRIM(@batch)) <> '' AND @expDate < GetDate())

BEGIN

SELECT @error = -1

SELECT @error_message = N'Error - Batch ' + @batch + ' for item ' + @item + ' in warehouse ' + @whs + ' has expired. Please choose a different batch.'

END

END

entry.title: SAP B1 Resources Posting Ex.Rate in Production Process
entry.content:
1. In SAP Business One 9.3 PL10 on SQL
  2. Having item with BoM > in this BoM having items and resources
  3. Posting Production Order for example with DocDate: 01-04-2023
  4. Posting Goods Issue for production with the same date: 01-04-2023
  5. The Goods Issue for Production has been posted on 09-04-2023
  6. The generated JE from the Goods Issue is posting the totals correctly for the local currency, but when it comes to the system currency totals:
  7. It posts the items with the ex.rate on the Goods Issue Document Date
  8. Where it posts the resources system currency total with the ex.rate on the Posting Date of the Goods Issue Document Date

Why for the same Goods Issue document SAP posts resources on the posting date ex.rate where posting the items total for the same document on the DocDate instead of the Posting Date?

SAP Business OneMicrosoft SQL Server

entry.title: -146 Tenant not exists
entry.content:
We've encountered an error "-146 - Tenant not exists" while attempting to connect to SAP through the DI API. Our setup involves two databases: production and sandbox. Upon investigation, we've noted that this error occurs only when switching databases.

To elaborate, if we initially connect to the production database, we can establish the connection successfully. However, upon switching to the sandbox database, we encounter the "-146 - Tenant not exists" error. Similarly, if we first connect to the sandbox database, the connection is successful, but switching to the production database results in the same error.

We have attached the DI API log for reference. 

Company::_SetLastError error code:-146, error msg: Tenant is not exist, error context: 
After  Command "Company:Connect", InterfaceID="00000274B573C4C0" Output Type="long", Output Value = "-146" 
Before Command "Company:GetLastErrorCode", InterfaceID="00000274B573C4C0"  
After  Command "Company:GetLastErrorCode", InterfaceID="00000274B573C4C0" Output Type="long", Output Value = "-146" 
Before Command "Company:GetLastErrorDescription", InterfaceID="00000274B573C4C0"  
After  Command "Company:GetLastErrorDescription", InterfaceID="00000274B573C4C0" Output Type="String", Output Value = "Tenant is not exist" 
Before GetProperty Interface="Company" InterfaceID="-1250704192" PropertyName="Connected" value=""
After  GetProperty Interface="Company" InterfaceID="-1250704192" PropertyName="Connected" value="0"
Before GetProperty Interface="Company" InterfaceID="-1250704192" PropertyName="Connected" value=""
After  GetProperty Interface="Company" InterfaceID="-1250704192" PropertyName="Connected" value="0"

entry.title: Copy To Button is disable after upload purchase blanket agreement SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have uploaded Purchase blanket agreement via DTW but after check into SAP , Copy to Button is disable into Purchase blanket agreement into SAP B1.

Issue : Copy To Button is disable after upload purchase blanket agreement SAP B1

SAP Business One

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Error showing while Login the User in SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

One of user facing an issue while login to SAP B1,

"User is Already Logged On in the System. Click Yes if You Want to Unlock the Instances That Are Locked in the Other Sessions."

We have disconnected the User from Connected Clients from all DBs & from Task Manager.

Also we have restarted the Server, but same issue we persist.

Please guide how we can resolved this issue.

 

Regards,

Shubham Bulley
